# Kairox FZC LLC

Kairox FZC LLC builds practical AI employees and workflow automation for UAE SMEs.

## Website
https://agentevo.online

## Core services
- AI automation for UAE SMEs
- AI sales agents
- AI customer support agents
- AI receptionist and appointment booking agents
- WhatsApp AI automation
- Workflow automation and business process optimization
- Custom AI employees for real estate, automotive, healthcare, retail, hospitality, education, professional services and other SME sectors

## Contact
- Email: kairoxly@gmail.com
- WhatsApp: +971 52 285 5000
- Office: Amber Gem Tower, Sheikh Khalifa Street, Ajman, United Arab Emirates

## Important public facts
- Plans start from AED 750/month.
- One-time setup and business process design starts from AED 1,500.
- Kairox is UAE-based and can support clients remotely.
- AI support can be available 24/7. Human office support is Monday to Thursday, 10:00 a.m. to 5:00 p.m.
